nasb.text: Every sabbath day he shall set it in order before the Lord continually; it is an everlasting covenant for the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Every Sabbath day Aaron shall arrange it before the Lord regularly; it is from the people of Israel as a covenant forever.

cnv.text: 每一個安息日，亞倫都要把餅擺在耶和華面前，不可間斷，這是以色列人永遠的約。

ccb.text: 每逢安息日，要定期把饼摆在耶和华面前。这是以色列人要永远遵守的约。
